detail.description:
A Peaceful Journey Through Traditional Flavors
Step into a quiet countryside kitchen where tradition meets tranquility. Unlike fast-paced cooking games, this game invites you to embrace slow living, breathe in the scent of homemade dishes, and rediscover the joy of cooking in a rustic, heartwarming setting.

Key Features:
- Gentle, Stress-Free Gameplay
Cook at your own pace with intuitive touch controls and no pressure. There's no rush — only the simple pleasure of preparing meaningful meals.

-
detail.releaseNotes:
- Update new menu
- Fix bug level 131
- Improve game play
